component.name: Spottyfi
component.summary: A native Rust Spotify client with a docking workspace UI

description.p: Spottyfi is a native, keyboard-first Spotify client. It streams real audio through librespot using your own Spotify Premium account and presents a dockable tab and panel workspace: pages open as tabs, and the album-art, queue, lyrics and devices panels can be dragged into splits.
It pairs the information density of the leaked internal Spotify imgui tool with the feature surface of the modern desktop client.

ul.li: Real audio playback via librespot (Spotify Premium required)
Dockable tabs and panels with persistent layouts
Library, search, browse, queue and time-synced lyrics
Full-song waveform seek bar, decoded in the background
Spotify Connect device picker with remote playback control
Recently Played and Your Artists library pages
Save tracks to Liked Songs from the track menu
End-to-end caching and prefetch so pages open instantly
